experiment.name: tool_distractor_resilience__haiku_10tools_vs_sonnet_1tool
experiment.description: Same task, varying tool count (1/5/10/20). Measures distractor tool impact on haiku vs sonnet.

tasks.prompt: Calculate the sum of all prime numbers below 100. Use a Python one-liner via Bash. Give the final number.
Write a Python script that computes the first 20 Fibonacci numbers and prints them as a comma-separated list. Run it via Bash.
Read the file data.csv in the current directory. Count the number of lines (excluding the header). Print just the count.
